rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE PEARL A. HENNIGH TRUST DTD JUNE 22, 1999, AS AMENDED TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: Petition For Order Authorizing And Directing Successor Trustee To Pay From Trust Principal Additional Attorneys Fees Relating To Resolution Of Two Felony Cases Against Primary Trust Beneficiary, Gary Wayne Hennigh, And Implementing And Ensuring Compliance With Terms Of Resulting Plea Deal
rulings.Rulings: hearing. appearance required. Mr. Hennigh has left a number of messages with the court to say he needs help. all attorneys to appear. prior to the hearing, Counsel must file a declaration setting forth the beneficiaries of the trust and their current addresses. She will be asked for a file stamped copy of that declaration at the hearing.
